name: Hard Rock Pinball
short_description: Have fun, challenge yourself, defeat the bosses and test your luck in this pinball game to the sound of drums, guitars and synthesizers. What's up? liked? So ... Let's Rock!
detailed_description:
HARD ROCK PINBALL is a game that seeks to bring all the experience of the old pinball machines, to the sound of guitars, drums and synthesizers, in addition to inserting a slot machine to test your luck and bosses that must be defeated.

In Hard Rock Pinball, you will find:

3 TYPES OF BALLS:
You can choose the type of ball used in the game, with each ball having its own characteristics, giving different playing styles.

3 DIFFERENT TABLES:
There are 3 tables available for you to have fun.

BOSSES:
Each boss in the game has a different type of attack!

SLOT MACHINES:
Test your luck at the game's slot machines, where you can earn points and credits.

What's up? liked? So let's rock!
